title: Dubai Prepares for the Worst as Iran Launches Drones and Missiles
description: Dubai defense systems repel Iranian drones and missiles as random explosions and plumes of black smoke can be seen rising out of the city-state’s most celebrated neighborhood. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports from Dubai on "Bloomberg This Weekend." (Source: Bloomberg)
